response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned polyglot engineer with roughly 15+ years of experience, strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, open-source test frameworks), and genuine high-scale production experience handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, plus recent AI-agent tooling work that matches the AI-velocity preferred qualification. However, the role is a Principal IC6 position centered on experimentation systems, and his resume shows no experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement experience, nor the statistical analysis depth the role requires. His career trajectory is senior/staff-level individual contribution with relatively short tenures, with limited evidence of principal-level, multi-workstream leadership across teams at enterprise scale. He could be a strong senior hire elsewhere, but for this specific role the domain and scope gaps are substantial.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering (TypeScript, C/C++, Java, C#, DLang) with strong testing and craftsmanship culture
Real distributed-systems scale: low-latency services handling millions of HTTP requests per second in ad-tech
Recent AI tooling experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow infrastructure) plus open-source framework authorship
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience anywhere on the resume
No demonstrated principal-level scope: roles are senior/staff IC work, with limited multi-team architectural leadership
Little evidence of the required data aptitude in metrics, telemetry pipelines, or statistical experiment analysis

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals at production scale
